scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/docs && cp evaluation.html dist/ && cp PROTOCOL.md README.md dist/ && cp docs/*.md dist/docs/ 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
